text:
Chiffon Toto (シフォン＝トト, Shifon Toto) is a member of the Heil-Ly Family. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 36, Chapter 378 

Appearance

Chiffon is a young girl with small eyes and a small nose. Her fair hair falls just below her face, and she has bangs that reach her eyebrows.

Personality

Chiffon seemed anxious in her initial appearance, but she is cheerful and easygoing as she works with Montblanc to dispose of corpses for the family. Like her fellow Heil-Ly members, she seems to have sadistic tendencies and no qualms about killing people. 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

Chiffon is seen with the other Heil-Ly members as Morena uses her Contagion on them one at a time and explains how her Nen ability works. 

After Bille kills Tassi, Terebellum carries his corpse to a large laundry room in the Heil-Ly's hideout. He calls out to Montblanc that the corpse is the last one and adds that Voconte connected the room to processing. She asks Chiffon for help, and she quickly stops hanging up clothes and agrees to help. Terebellum tells them that they will all reach level 21 soon, pointing out that it's almost time for them to level up. As Montblanc holds a large blade in her hand, Chiffon begins to remove Tassi's clothes and happily looks forward to leveling up. It's then stated that Montblanc Toto (level 3) is a Conjurer, cleaner, and involved in feed manufacturing. Chiffon Toto (level 6) is also a Conjurer and skilled in sewing and arts and crafts. 

When Hinrigh and Nobunaga infiltrate the Heil-Ly's hideout, Chiffon and Montblanc can be seen sitting together at the main table with several other members. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 38, Chapter 399 

Abilities & Powers

Nen

Chiffon is a Conjurer. Having reached level 6 with Morena's Nen ability, Chiffon's aura amount and output have been increased. 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

Chiffon is named after the dessert called Chiffon cake. She shares a similar origin of her name with every other female member of the Heil-Ly Family: Cashew, Gelato, Montblanc Toto, and Soufflé.
Chiffon shares her surname with Montblanc, but it is currently unconfirmed if (or how) they are related. Given their close relationship, they are most likely sisters.
